---
title: "Content Lake"
---

---
title: "Content Lake"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Content-Intelligence-Architecture/rik1744709937147"
section: "Content Intelligence Architecture"
---

![](data:image/png;base64,)
Curated and enriched content is stored in the Content Lake, which provides:

-
Storage for content and metadata

-
Security enforcement

-
Embedding/vector indexing

Multiple repositories can be AI-enriched and indexed into a single Content Lake, enabling semantic queries across multiple sources.

The Content Lake uses our cloud repository, HXPR.
